name: PERPETUA RESOURCES CORP.
business: Perpetua Resources Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on advancing the Stibnite Gold Project in Idaho, which contains gold, silver, and antimony deposits. The company plans to redevelop three deposits and reprocess historical tailings, with the goal of producing gold, silver, and antimony concentrate. Its principal business for the coming years is the construction, development, and operation of the Stibnite Gold Project.
sellsTo: antimony concentrate buyers (domestic defense and industrial users)

exposures.sentence: The Corporation is engaged in acquiring mining properties with the intention of exploring, evaluating, developing and placing them into production, if warranted.
Perpetua Resources vision is to provide the United States with a domestic source of the critical mineral antimony.
the Company announced a partnership with Idaho National Labs to conduct pilot-scale testing to produce antimony trisulfide for domestic uses.

catalysts.event: USFS issued the Final Record of Decision approving the Modified Mine Plan
catalysts.sentence: On January 3, 2025, the USFS published the ROD and FEIS Errata approving the Modified Mine Plan for the Project.

catalysts.event: USACE issued the CWA Section 404 permit
catalysts.sentence: On May 19, 2025, the USACE issued the CWA Section 404 permit for the Project.

catalysts.event: USFS approved the Plan of Operations
catalysts.sentence: the USFS on October 20, 2025, issued notice that the requirements necessary to start construction had been satisfied, the Plan of Operations had been approved and signed by USFS.
the Company began early works construction for the Project on October 21, 2025.

catalysts.event: U.S. EXIM Board initiated Congressional notification for a $2.7 billion loan
catalysts.sentence: On March 30, 2026, the board of U.S. EXIM initiated the last formal step before a vote for final approval of an approximately $2.7 billion senior secured loan for the construction and development of the Project by unanimously agreeing to publish a notification to Congress.

catalysts.event: Anticipated final vote on U.S. EXIM loan
catalysts.sentence: Based on the Congressional review timeline and U.S. EXIM process, the Company anticipates a final vote on the loan by the board of U.S. EXIM shortly after the notice period ends.

catalysts.event: Anticipated closing of U.S. EXIM loan and full construction decision
catalysts.sentence: Any funding under the loan (if approved) would be subject to finalization of definitive loan documents with U.S. EXIM and satisfaction of all conditions to closing, which the Company anticipates could occur in the second half of 2026.
